variant: give me the numbers on sleep and muscle growth, bold each stat

request.message: give me the numbers on sleep and muscle growth, bold each stat

response_body.response: here's what your protocol says on sleep and muscle growth: **7–9 hours** nightly is the target. on training days, add a wind-down cue 60 minutes before bed to lock it in. that's it—the docs don't break down the mechanistic numbers (cortisol, protein synthesis, recovery windows, etc.), just the actionable minimum. the bigger picture: sleep sits alongside protein (~1g per lb bodyweight), calories (adjusted by phase), and progressive overload. all four move together. you're 64.5 kg, so that's roughly 142g protein daily minimum. without the sleep, the protein and training don't compound the same way.

products.name: Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard 100% Whey Protein
products.description: 24g whey isolate per scoop — third-party tested, low-cost per gram.
